subject: [PATCH v1 05/17] fuse: prepare for long lived reference on backing file

2026-04-20.patch_summary: This patch prepares the FUSE (Filesystem in Userspace) kernel module to support long-lived references to backing files. Currently, a backing file is attached and detached on each open and close operation. To enable attaching a backing file without an open file, this patch introduces a new flag for long-lived backing file attachment and modifies several functions to handle this new behavior.
